title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yatra Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Yatra Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Yatra Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yatra Hotels:
Yatra Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Hotels!
